rules.rule: Validated, copied, transported, signed, or restored bytes must share one explicit identity.
Loaded, present, or started is not proof of health; require the documented observable readiness check.
Exceptions and partial failures must reach cleanup, status, notification, and receipt paths without reporting success.
Locked setup and validation must work in a clean checkout without developer-local paths or ambient dependencies.
Scans, reconciliations, and authority checks must not silently omit eligible branches, files, records, or states.
